title: Code for publication "Chromosome-scale genome assembly reveals how repeat elements shape non-coding RNA landscapes active during newt limb regeneration"
author: Leigh, Nicholas D
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the code associated with "Chromosome-scale genome assembly reveals how repeat elements shape non-coding RNA landscapes active during newt limb regeneration". First pre-printed here:  https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2022.10.19.512763v2 .  
 This repository contains all code that is not included in the Methods section of the paper.
steps_raw:
This is the code associated with "Chromosome-scale genome assembly reveals how repeat elements shape non-coding RNA landscapes active during newt limb regeneration". First pre-printed here:  https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2022.10.19.512763v2 .  
 This repository contains all code that is not included in the Methods section of the paper.
